data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked), but the evidence does not include any checks or reads that confirm this functionality. The absence of any related data or endpoints that demonstrate the existence of a verification timeline indicates a significant gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, there are no references to the verification status of any credentials or documents, which is critical for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
